name: Canakinumab
summary: IL-1beta-targeting monoclonal antibody with large cardiovascular outcomes evidence in inflammatory-risk patients.
mechanism_summary: Blocks IL-1beta signaling to reduce downstream inflammatory activity, including inflammasome-linked vascular inflammation.

open_questions: Whether cytokine inhibition can improve aging-relevant outcomes outside high-risk cardiovascular populations
Whether benefit can be separated from infection and immunosuppression tradeoffs
